prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `7e4d4f7c`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `7e4d4f7c` in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e4d4f7c/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e4d4f7c/generator.py#L8), and [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e4d4f7c/__init__.py#L5). The rule is: keep the first two input rows, then make a third row by copying row 0 and replacing the row-0 color that does not appear in row 1 columns `1..end` with color `6`.

The summary hint was used, not discarded; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed. The generator stays on-family by explicitly building a 2-color top row, a distinct marker color at column 0 on odd rows, background-only even rows, and then deriving the 3-row output from that latent structure. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed: `5/5` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and I visually spot-checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e4d4f7c/previews/preview_01.png). Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e4d4f7c/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e4d4f7c/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e4d4f7c/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e4d4f7c/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e4d4f7c/previews/preview_03.png).
